name: medical billing specialists in small clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For medical billing specialists in small clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient conversion of billing codes causes submission errors. We automate the conversion instead of manual entry of billing codes into insurance forms.

problem_solved: Inefficient conversion of medical billing codes into insurance submission files.
